---
name: never-leak-internal-context-in-responses
description: No user-facing response (page, problem+json error, or AI/LLM output) may expose internal context, system prompts, model reasoning, secrets, internal IDs, paths, SQL, stack traces, or another tenant's data.
paths: ["src/**", "templates/**", "config/packages/**"]
severity: must
---
# Never leak internal context in responses

**Rule:** Nothing internal crosses the boundary into a user-facing response, a rendered page, a `problem+json` error, or text generated by an AI/LLM feature. No system/developer prompt, no model reasoning, no secrets, internal IDs, file paths, SQL, stack traces, or framework debug output, and never another tenant's data. Treat model output as untrusted: never echo the prompt back, withhold the reasoning, escape what you render, and authorize every datum a model can surface exactly like any other read (SQLFilter + RLS + Voter). In production, errors return a generic `problem+json` with the detail logged server-side behind a correlation id; the profiler and verbose traces stay in dev only.

**Why:** OWASP A01 (information disclosure) and A05 (verbose errors / misconfiguration), plus the LLM prompt-leak class. Internal context handed to a user is free reconnaissance; cross-tenant data in a response is a breach. ISO 27001 control. This is the runtime counterpart of `ai/keep-agent-context-files-curated`, which keeps internals out of context files at author time.

**Good / Bad:**
```php
// Bad: the user sees the internal message and stack trace.
catch (\Throwable $e) {
    return new Response($e->getMessage()."\n".$e->getTraceAsString(), 500);
}

// Good: log the detail server-side, return a generic problem+json with a reference id.
catch (\Throwable $e) {
    $correlationId = (string) Uuid::v7();
    $this->logger->error('checkout failed', ['exception' => $e, 'correlation_id' => $correlationId]); // server-side
    return $this->problem(500, 'Une erreur interne est survenue.', ['ref' => $correlationId]);
}
```
```twig
{# Bad: an AI reply rendered raw, echoing its own system prompt. #}
{{ ai_reply | raw }}
{# Good: escaped, prompt + reasoning withheld, data already org-scoped. #}
{{ ai_reply.visibleText }}
```

**See also:** [[always-prevent-idor]], [[never-expose-secrets-to-the-frontend]], ai/treat-ai-output-as-untrusted-until-integrated, observability/never-swallow-exceptions, http-and-caching/use-correct-verbs-codes-and-problem-json, database/always-enforce-tenant-isolation.

**Enforced by:** review; `APP_DEBUG=0` and no profiler in prod; the `problem+json` error handler; structured server-side logging; tenant-isolation test.
